Speakers.Speaker: Uploading Save Data to the Network

Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}By saving your game in the NETWORK SLOT, you can upload save data online instead of saving it to the main console storage.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You will need an account for PlayStation™Network to utilize the NETWORK SLOT.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Game data saved using this method can be transferred between PlayStation®4 and PlayStation®5 consoles.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}However, trophies earned during gameplay on one console {f 0 1 2}will not transfer{f 0 1 27} to another console that you transfer your save data to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Keep in mind, certain trophies {f 0 1 2}cannot be earned unless you start a new game from the beginning or with clear data{f 0 1 27}, if you have not already earned them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Also, trophies based on numerical values, such as completing an action a certain number of times or attaining a certain amount of something, will be {f 0 1 2}reset to zero upon transferring to a different console{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
